SageKapila, propoundcr of the Sankhya system of philosophy,
has declared Pradhanaor unmanifested Prakrti (primordial matter)
to be the material cause of the universe, while Sage Kaniida, foun-
der of the Varesika system or atomic theory of the origin of the
universe, has stated that the seven categories headed by Dravyas
or substances constitute its material cause. According to some
Time is the root cause of the universe. There are others like the
